metrics.attack_success_rate: attacked score manipulation success / attacked scenarios
metrics.detector_availability: detector healthy or degraded-but-available decisions / decisions
metrics.latency_p50_p95_p99: nearest-rank percentiles over measured local request latencies
metrics.macro_f1: mean per-class F1 over attack and clean classes
metrics.over_block_rate: benign samples where selected action is stronger than expected_action_range
metrics.precision: TP / (TP + FP), zero denominator => 1.0 with zero_denominator flag
metrics.recall: TP / (TP + FN), zero denominator => 1.0 with zero_denominator flag
metrics.secure_recovery_rate: protected score recovery / attack-induced score drift
metrics.under_block_rate: attack samples where selected action is weaker than expected_action_range
